channel.title: GitLab on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in GitLab on Notities

item.title: Installing GitLab on Docker in AlmaLinux 8.10
item.description:
Step 1: Update System

$ sudo dnf update
$ sudo dnf install epel-release
$ sudo /usr/bin/crb enable

Step 2: Install Docker from AlmaLinux Repo

$ sudo dnf config-manager --add-repo=https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
$ sudo dnf remove -y podman podman-docker podman-plugins
$ sudo dnf remove -y runc
$ sudo dnf clean all
$ sudo dnf install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
$ sudo systemctl enable --now docker
$ sudo systemctl status docker
$ sudo usermod -aG docker $USER

Step 3: Logout and back in
